items.title_en: Household worries over finances hit highest level since July 2022, New York Fed survey shows
items.title_zh: 纽约联储调查显示，家庭对财务的担忧达到 2022 年 7 月以来的最高水平
items.desc_en: While the central bank's monthly survey showed the inflation outlook mostly unchanged, the general perception of conditions deteriorated.
items.desc_zh: 尽管央行的月度调查显示通胀前景基本没有变化，但人们对状况的普遍看法却恶化了。

items.title_en: Novo and Lilly are competing to win the GLP-1 pill market as they prepare for Medicare coverage
items.title_zh: Novo 和 Lilly 正在争夺 GLP-1 药丸市场，为医疗保险覆盖做准备
items.desc_en: Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly bring their longtime rivalry to GLP-1 pills and prepare to make their pitch to seniors with Medicare.
items.desc_zh: 诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 和礼来 (Eli Lilly) 将长期的竞争带入 GLP-1 药物领域，并准备向拥有 Medicare 的老年人推销。

items.desc_en: The U.S. will lean on the same playbook it did starting in the late 1950s, part of which involves releasing sterile insects to suppress the pest's population.

items.title_zh: 美国银行表示获利了结：“危险信号太多”

items.title_en: United CEO brushes off airline mergers after American rejection: 'There's nothing'

items.desc_zh: 当被问及航空公司之间的整合浪潮时，柯比表示，进一步的合并机会看起来不太可能：“什么都没有。”

items.desc_zh: Lavazza 通过 Tablì 押注可持续性仍然是许多咖啡饮用者的首要考虑因素。

items.title_en: Retirees fear running out of money. Many are spending too little instead
items.title_zh: 退休人员担心钱花光。相反，许多人花费太少

items.desc_zh: 退休人员经常关注退休后过度消费的风险。但支出太少会带来另一种危险。

items.title_en: China is helping to cushion global oil prices below $100 — but analysts warn it won’t last
items.title_zh: 中国正在帮助将全球油价缓冲到100美元以下——但分析师警告称这种情况不会持续太久
items.desc_en: China has reduced oil imports since the start of the Iran war, capping global crude prices.
items.desc_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，中国减少了石油进口，限制了全球原油价格。

items.title_en: Weight loss drug maker sinks 25% after new safety data spooks investors
items.title_zh: 新的安全数据吓坏了投资者，减肥药制造商股价下跌 25%

items.desc_zh: 虽然实验药物达到了其关键目标，但分析师对副作用带来的商业机会感到担忧。

items.title_en: USAA to return nearly $1 billion to Florida members as legal reforms help lower insurance costs
items.title_zh: 由于法律改革有助于降低保险成本，USAA 将向佛罗里达会员返还近 10 亿美元
items.desc_en: USAA said it will deliver nearly $1 billion in combined savings and returns to eligible Florida members, including a $500 million dividend, CNBC can exclusively report.
items.desc_zh: 据 CNBC 独家报道，USAA 表示，将向符合条件的佛罗里达州会员提供近 10 亿美元的综合储蓄和回报，其中包括 5 亿美元的股息。

items.title_en: Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
items.title_zh: 埃里克森在丹麦比赛中倒地后意识清醒
items.desc_en: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark's friendly against Ukraine but is now conscious, says the Danish Football Association.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦足协表示，克里斯蒂安·埃里克森在丹麦对阵乌克兰的友谊赛中晕倒，但目前已经清醒。

items.title_en: Mexico City attempts record-breaking wave
items.title_zh: 墨西哥城尝试破纪录的浪潮
items.desc_en: As part of the countdown to the World Cup, Mexico City is attempting to surpass the world record for largest wave.
items.desc_zh: 作为世界杯倒计时的一部分，墨西哥城正试图超越最大波浪的世界纪录。

items.title_en: Hundreds of captives freed from Boko Haram mountain hideout
items.title_zh: 数百名俘虏从博科圣地山区藏身处获释
items.desc_en: The group includes many women and children who were abducted in March from an area close to Cameroon.
items.desc_zh: 该组织包括三月份在喀麦隆附近地区被绑架的许多妇女和儿童。

items.title_en: Claude Artifact Player
items.title_zh: Claude Artifact Player
items.desc_en: Run Claude Artifacts Locally
items.desc_zh: 在本地运行 Claude Artifacts

items.title_en: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基在伦敦会谈前批评切尔诺贝利无人机袭击是“卑鄙的”
items.desc_en: Ukrainian officials say a Russian drone hit a storage facility for spent nuclear fuel near the Chornobyl nuclear plant.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰官员称，一架俄罗斯无人机击中了切尔诺贝利核电站附近的乏核燃料储存设施。

items.title_en: Tamadoggo
items.title_zh: Tamadoggo
items.desc_en: A living journal for your pet's life, with AI insights
items.desc_zh: 包含人工智能见解的宠物生活生活日记

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Insecurity and instability drive voters in Peru's tight presidential race
items.title_zh: 不安全和不稳定推动选民参加秘鲁紧张的总统竞选
items.desc_en: After eight presidents in 10 years, many voters are looking for stability so the next president can focus on tackling crime and inequality.
items.desc_zh: 十年内当选了八位总统，许多选民都在寻求稳定，以便下一任总统能够专注于解决犯罪和不平等问题。

items.title_en: Vaani
items.title_zh: Vaani
items.desc_en: Lip-synced AI dubbing for creators, brands and studios
items.desc_zh: 为创作者、品牌和工作室提供对口型人工智能配音

items.title_zh: Job Postings API
items.desc_en: View, monitor, and analyze 1.8M+ US jobs
items.desc_zh: 查看、监控和分析超过 180 万个美国就业岗位

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.desc_en: My keyboard fell apart. Now it's your problem.
items.desc_zh: 我的键盘坏了。现在是你的问题了。

items.title_en: From Bitcoin to blockchain: Key cryptocurrency terms and what they mean
items.title_zh: 从比特币到区块链：关键的加密货币术语及其含义
items.desc_en: As the price of Bitcoin sinks once more, here's a guide to some of the trickiest crypto terms.
items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。

items.title_en: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
items.title_zh: 让食物垃圾变得有用又美味的古老技巧
items.desc_en: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.
items.desc_zh: 发酵并没有丢弃食品加工的副产品，而是使它们变得有价值。

items.title_en: Mark Zuckerberg's longest-serving employee on AI, jobs - and her boss
items.title_zh: 马克·扎克伯格在人工智能、就业领域任职时间最长的员工——以及她的老板
items.desc_en: Naomi Gleit has weathered many controversies at Meta, but remains in what she tells the BBC is her "dream job".
items.desc_zh: 娜奥米·格莱特 (Naomi Gleit) 在 Meta 经受住了许多争议，但仍然坚守在她告诉 BBC 的“梦想工作”岗位上。

items.title_en: AI needs a 'brake pedal', warns Anthropic co-founder
items.title_zh: Anthropic 联合创始人警告说，人工智能需要一个“刹车踏板”
items.desc_en: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.
items.desc_zh: 杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 告诉 BBC 新闻之夜，人工智能可以在没有人类输入的情况下实现发展。

items.title_en: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
items.title_zh: 考试监管机构警告高科技作弊现象增多
items.desc_en: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.
items.desc_zh: Ofqual 负责人表示，监考人员正在接受培训，以检测智能眼镜和隐藏式耳机等设备。

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界上最富有的人，他利用自己的平台在广泛的话题上表达了自己的观点。

items.title_en: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
items.title_zh: 研究称火车上的电话信号大多数时候都不够好
items.desc_en: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。
